description: Interactive animator that moves a point from its current position to a target position
utility: Animate point movements and position changes with play/reset control

arguments.name: sourcePoint
arguments.description: Variable reference to an existing point to animate

arguments.name: targetPoint
arguments.description: Target point expression (can be inline or variable reference)

arguments.name: styles
arguments.description: Optional styling: c(), s(), t(), defer(), etc.

examples.scenario: Animate tangent point along x² curve
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), 13.8, 20.3, range(-3, 3), range(-2, 10), type(plotting))
plot_1 = plot(graph_1, "x^2")
point_1 = point(graph_1, -2, 4)
tangent_1 = tangent(graph_1, plot_1, point_1)
ptanim_1 = pointanimator(point_1, point(graph_1, 2, 4))

examples.scenario: Animate perpendicular slope point along a segment
examples.expression:
graph_1 = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
point_1 = point(graph_1, -3.4, 3.0)
point_2 = point(graph_1, 3, 2)
line_1 = line(graph_1, point_1, point_2, type(segment))
ptanim_1 = pointanimator(point_2, point(graph_1, 1, 4))

examples.scenario: Animate point to another named point
examples.expression:
G = g2d(at(4,19), size(16), range(-5, 5), type(geometry))
point_1 = point(G, 0, 0)
point_2 = point(G, 4, 3)
ptanim_1 = pointanimator(point_1, point_2)
